channel.title: The Bob Hope Show | Ghost of Radio
channel.description: Stream all 203 The Bob Hope Show episodes free on Ghost of Radio. Classic old time radio.
channel.itunes:author: Ghost of Radio

image.title: The Bob Hope Show | Ghost of Radio
